Effective Date of RepealRepeal effective 120 days following , or such later date prescribed by the Secretary but in no event more than 180 days following , see , set out as an Effective Date note under .Aug. 1, 1968Aug. 1, 1968section 1377 of Pub. L. 90–448section 4001 of this title
